def positive_pandas_read_without_chunksize_large_file():
    rule_id = "pandas_read_without_chunksize_large_file"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Data-loading functions read large tabular files without chunksize or nrows limits."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
